user.title: Connect an open data dataset
user.description: Choose the portal provider and identify a dataset. CKAN resource ID is optional when the package has one DataStore resource.

data.dataset_id: Dataset ID or CKAN package name
data.timestamp_field: Timestamp field used to select the newest row (optional)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the portal.
error.invalid_dataset: The portal, dataset, resource, or timestamp field is invalid.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This open data resource is already configured.
